resources.string: Common ore. Combine with tin ore to smelt bronze bars.
Common ore. Combine with copper ore to smelt bronze bars.
Versatile ore used to smelt iron and steel bars.
Used as a fuel component when smelting steel and higher-tier bars.
Precious ore used to craft silver bars and jewellery.
Precious ore used to craft gold bars and jewellery.
A rare ore with magical properties.
Extremely hard and very rare ore.
The rarest mineable ore, used for the strongest equipment.
Raw magical stone used to craft all types of runes.
Smelted from copper ore and tin ore. The most basic metal bar.
A sturdy iron bar used for crafting iron equipment.
Refined silver bar used for crafting jewellery.
Stronger than iron. Used for crafting steel equipment.
Refined gold bar used for crafting jewellery and gold equipment.
A rare and lustrous platinum bar for high-tier jewellery.
A blue gemstone used in jewellery crafting.
A green gemstone of moderate rarity.
A red gemstone. Rare and valuable.
The rarest and most valuable gemstone.
Basic logs from normal trees. Used in Firemaking and Fletching.
Imbued logs from rare magic trees.
Massive logs from the tallest redwood trees.
Raw sea turtle. Cook before eating.
Raw manta ray. Cook before eating.
Cooked shrimp. Restores a small amount of HP.
Cooked sardine. Restores HP when eaten.
Cooked herring. Restores HP when eaten.
Cooked mackerel. Restores HP when eaten.
Cooked trout. Restores HP when eaten.
Cooked salmon. Restores HP when eaten.
Cooked tuna. Restores HP when eaten.
Cooked lobster. Restores a good amount of HP.
Cooked swordfish. Restores a significant amount of HP.
Cooked monkfish. Restores a solid amount of HP.
Cooked shark. Restores a large amount of HP.
Cooked sea turtle. Restores a very large amount of HP.
Cooked manta ray. One of the best food items available.
Raw rat meat. Cook before eating.
Unidentified raw meat. Cook before eating.
Cooked rat meat. Barely edible, but restores a tiny amount of HP.
Cooked chicken. Restores HP when eaten.
Cooked mutton. Restores HP when eaten.
Cooked beef. Restores HP when eaten.
A curved one-handed bronze blade with good strength bonus.
A two-handed bronze sword. High damage, slow speed.
A quick and lightweight bronze dagger.
A curved one-handed iron blade with good strength bonus.
A quick and lightweight iron dagger.
A curved one-handed steel blade with good strength bonus.
A curved mithril blade, supernaturally sharp.
A mithril battleaxe of exceptional quality.
An incredibly hard curved blade with excellent strength bonus.
A two-handed sword forged from adamantite.
An extraordinarily heavy and hard warhammer.
The finest scimitar available, with exceptional strength bonus.
A simple wooden bow. Good for training Ranged.
A reliable bow crafted from oak wood.
A simple magical staff for apprentice mages.
An improved staff for developing mages.
An elemental staff imbued with the power of air.
An elemental staff imbued with the power of water.
An elemental staff imbued with the power of earth.
An elemental staff imbued with the power of fire.
A staff imbued with psychic energy.
A chaotic staff pulsing with wild magical energy.
A dark staff wreathed in the power of death.
A powerful staff fuelled by blood magic.
A lightweight magical pickaxe for Mining.
An extremely hard pickaxe for Mining.
The finest pickaxe available for Mining.
A lightweight magical axe for Woodcutting.
An extremely hard axe for Woodcutting.
The finest axe available for Woodcutting.
Wooden shafts used to fletch arrows.
Bronze tips for fletching bronze arrows.
Iron tips for fletching iron arrows.
Steel tips for fletching steel arrows.
Mithril tips for fletching mithril arrows.
Adamantite tips for fletching adamantite arrows.
Runite tips for fletching runite arrows.
A silver ring set with a sapphire.
A silver necklace set with a sapphire.
A gold ring set with a sapphire.
A gold necklace set with a sapphire.
A platinum ring set with a sapphire.
A platinum necklace set with a sapphire.
A gold ring set with an emerald.
A gold necklace set with an emerald.
A platinum ring set with an emerald.
A platinum necklace set with an emerald.
A gold ring set with a ruby.
A gold necklace set with a ruby.
A platinum ring set with a ruby.
A platinum necklace set with a ruby.
A gold ring set with a diamond.
A gold necklace set with a diamond.
A platinum ring set with a diamond.
A platinum necklace set with a diamond.
Burnt remnants of regular logs. Scatter in the Prayer skill for bonus Prayer XP.
Burnt remnants of oak logs. Scatter for more Prayer XP than regular ashes.
Burnt remnants of willow logs. Scatter for Prayer XP.
Burnt remnants of maple logs. Scatter for Prayer XP.
Burnt remnants of yew logs. Scatter for significant Prayer XP.
Burnt remnants of magic logs. Scatter for substantial Prayer XP.
Burnt remnants of redwood logs. Scatter for the most Prayer XP of any ash.
Bones from a small creature. Bury for Prayer XP.
Larger bones. Grant more Prayer XP when buried.
Massive bones from powerful foes. Grant significant Prayer XP.
Ancient dragon bones. Grant the most Prayer XP when buried.
A tough scale from a green dragon. Rare and valuable.
The currency of the realm. Spend at the shop.
Battered armour dropped by goblins. Sells well.
Fine silk spun by giant spiders. Valuable to crafters.
A venomous fang from a giant spider.
Rough hide from a cow. Used in leather crafting.
A feather used in fletching arrows.
Decaying flesh from an undead creature. Smells terrible.
A magical bean with mysterious properties.
A scorched fang from a hellhound.
A jagged horn torn from a lesser demon.
A huge, gnarled bone from a mountain troll.
A rune imbued with the power of air. Used in air spells.
A rune imbued with the power of water.
A rune imbued with the power of earth.
A rune imbued with the power of fire.
A rune of wild, chaotic magic.
A rune infused with the power of death.
A rare rune fuelled by blood magic.
